text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, Doto. Care to join me for<n>some
partner running?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! Y-you want me to be yourpartner?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course! I have no doubt that you<n>and I will
be able to synchronize<n>splendidly!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-in that case, how could I refuse?! I'll do<n>my best
to—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hm? Synchronize? Like synchronizedswimming? Y-you said partner running,right?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, may the refrain we compose be as<n>beautiful
as two butterflies stroking the<n>wind with their
wings!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
N-no worries, I can handle that! I just<n>need to go
change into my swimsuit!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Aha! Wearing swimsuits while running<n>would
indeed be a sight to behold! A<n>marvelous idea!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then I too shall don my swimsuit!
